movesList.name: Combo Attack
inputs: COM    Opponent can only be damaged by combos.

movesList.name: Custom Combo
inputs: CUS    Opponent can only be damaged by Custom Combos.

movesList.name: Drama Survival
inputs: DSU    Fight with an ally against multiple opponents.

movesList.name: Dramatic Battle
inputs: DRA    Fight with an ally to defeat the opponent.

movesList.name: Gauge Hyper
inputs: HYP    Opponent's Super Combo meter charges quickly.

movesList.name: Gauge MAX
inputs: MAX    Opponent's Super Combo meter will always be at MAX.

movesList.name: Guard Crush
inputs: GUA    Attack the opponent after performing a Guard Crush.

movesList.name: Power Type
inputs: POW    Opponent's attack are much more powerful.

movesList.name: R Dramatic
inputs: RDR    Opponents attack in combinations.

movesList.name: Recovery Battle
inputs: REC    Opponent will regain life gauge.

movesList.name: Stun Attack
inputs: STU    Opponent's attacks make you dizzy.

movesList.name: Survival
inputs: SUR    Defeat several opponents to win.

movesList.name: Target Attack
inputs: TAR    Defeat the specified opponent.

movesList.name: Team Battle
inputs: TEA    Fight against a team of 2 or 3 characters.

movesList.name: Throw Attack
inputs: THR    Opponent can only be damaged by throws.

movesList.name: Time Attack
inputs: TIM    Defeat the opponent in more limited time.

movesList.name: Air Guard
inputs: Allows you to guard against attacks in the air.

movesList.name: Alpha Cancel
inputs: Able to cancel normal moves with a Special Move.

movesList.name: Alpha Combo
inputs: Normal punches and kicks become multi-hit attacks.

movesList.name: Alpha Counter Plus
inputs: Attack power of Alpha Counters increases.

movesList.name: Auto Guard
inputs: Guards against attacks automatically.

movesList.name: Custom Combo
inputs: Able to perform Custom Combos.

movesList.name: Damage Plus
inputs: Causes more block damage to opponents.

movesList.name: Guard Power Plus
inputs: Inflict additional damage to opponent's GP Gauge.

movesList.name: Guard Smash
inputs: Attacks deal more guard damage and GP Gauge damage.

movesList.name: Infinite Guard
inputs: Your Guard Power Gauge will not go down.

movesList.name: Overall Power Up
inputs: Defensive power down, Offensive power up.

movesList.name: Resist Dizziness
inputs: Takes more hits to become dizzy.

movesList.name: Super Alpha Cancel
inputs: Able to cancel Special Moves into Super Combos.

movesList.name: Super Combo Gauge Plus
inputs: Super Combo Gauge recovers gradually.

movesList.name: Super Guard
inputs: No damage when blocking Special Moves.

movesList.name: Supreme Guard Smash
inputs: Inflict more GP Gauge damage with each attack.
